nodes.label: Seu de la CMT
nodes.rationale: Building element page for Seu de la CMT (Bolivia 56, 2010) by Batlle i Roig. References publication slug 76-08. Includes geocoordinates for map display.

nodes.label: Torre Glòries / Torre Agbar
nodes.rationale: Building element page for Torre Glòries (Av Diagonal 209-211, 2005) by Ateliers Jean Nouvel and B720 Arquitectes. References publication slug 76-08. Includes geocoordinates for map display.

nodes.label: En paper (Publications Collection)
nodes.rationale: Describes the paper and PDF publication collection of Guies d'Arquitectura i Urbanisme de Barcelona. Lists 13 thematic guide publications from 2016-2026. Expresses organizational preference for physical printed maps as primary format.

nodes.label: Publicacions (Publications Data Registry)
nodes.rationale: Authoritative data source for all publications (overrides old app database). Derived from client CSV. Defines 13 publication entries with slug, title, edition year, color, thematic groupings (Etapes/Arquitectura tematica/Barris/Art), field availability matrix (camps), and app migration state. Art-type publications (tapies, new-babylon) use null camps as they follow an itinerary schema rather than the standard building-entry schema.

nodes.label: Spanish Translations (Incomplete)
nodes.rationale: Spanish i18n is severely incomplete — only nav_label is defined while ca.yaml and en.yaml each define 9 keys. Footer and legal page strings would fall back to Catalan defaults at runtime.

nodes.label: Base Template (baseof.html)
nodes.rationale: Defines the page shell: head, header, main block, footer. Conditionally loads Leaflet JS and section-specific JS (mapa.js for list pages, fitxa.js for single pages) only within the elements section. All other layouts extend this via Hugo's {{ define 'main' }} block mechanism.

nodes.label: Default Single Template
nodes.rationale: Generic single-page renderer that outputs element frontmatter fields (adreca, any, tipologia, arquitectes, superficie, proteccio, premis, descripcio, descripcio_nomenclator, publicacions). Overlapped by elements/single.html which provides richer rendering for the same fields.

nodes.label: Elements Map List Template
nodes.rationale: Renders the elements index page with an interactive Leaflet map. Builds MAPA_PUNTS JSON from all child pages that have lat/long frontmatter. Builds PUBLICACIONS JSON from publicacions.yaml filtered to entries where estat_app.a_app is true. Provides map design variant navigation (Editorial/Nocturn/Guia themes).

nodes.label: Element Detail Template (Fitxa)
nodes.rationale: Renders individual building/element detail cards (fitxes). Reads publicacions.yaml to create colored publication tags linking back to the filtered elements list. Generates Google Maps link from adreca field. Outputs FITXA_PUNT for individual Leaflet map rendering. Includes prev/next navigation between elements in the same section.

nodes.label: Footer Partial
nodes.rationale: Three-column footer: about (El Globus Vermell), contact (email/phone from site.Params), social (Instagram/Facebook via site.Params). Legal links nav references i18n keys. Credits LinuxBCN.com for consultancy/development/hosting/design.

nodes.label: Header Partial
nodes.rationale: Renders site header with conditional logo (site.Params.logoImg → img tag, otherwise site.Params.logoText or site.Title as text). Iterates site.Menus.main for navigation. Uses i18n for aria-label on nav.
